# RUNSMSL — Run Staff Cooperative Multipurpose Society Limited

> A registered cooperative society serving the staff of Redeemer's University, Ede, Osun State, Nigeria. Members save together, access affordable loans, and build long-term wealth through shared dividends.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of RUNSMSL — mission, benefits, services, executives, news and contact.
- [Sign In](/login): Member sign-in with @run.edu.ng institutional Google account.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we collect, use and protect member personal data under the NDPA 2023.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookies): Cookies used on the site and how members can manage preferences.
